runTitle: WONT-FIX cleanup - retire no-action policy and tooling items
skippedSurfaces: Fixable AI routing and answer-quality WONT-FIX items

completedImprovements.title: Retire Server-Timing production visibility as platform constraint
completedImprovements.evidence: Vercel production drops Server-Timing on stream/proxy routes; X-AI-Latency-Ms and X-AI-Processing-Ms are the documented QA SSOT.
completedImprovements.note: No product code improvement needed; closed as accepted platform boundary.

completedImprovements.title: Retire Cloud Run cold-start optimization as Free Tier tradeoff
completedImprovements.evidence: Cloud Run production shape remains Free Tier aligned; min-instances/always-on keepalive is not an approved improvement path.
completedImprovements.note: No infrastructure upgrade or cost-increasing fix planned under current policy.

completedImprovements.title: Retire excessive cold-start wait as Free Tier tradeoff
completedImprovements.evidence: Issue requires min-instances/keepalive style mitigation to remove cold start; that conflicts with the current Free Tier operating shape.
completedImprovements.note: Keep retry/fallback UX within existing architecture; do not track as active improvement.

completedImprovements.title: Retire streaming fallback cold-start case as Free Tier tradeoff
completedImprovements.evidence: Failure mode is tied to Cloud Run cold start and fallback path timing; resource-level mitigation is intentionally out of scope.
completedImprovements.note: No separate active improvement remains after Free Tier tradeoff acceptance.

completedImprovements.title: Retire legacy JSON supervisor image fallback investigation
completedImprovements.evidence: Legacy JSON image POST path is not the current primary AI product surface.
completedImprovements.note: Reopen only if the authenticated frontend image-upload flow becomes a release-facing surface.

completedImprovements.title: Retire historical AI provider copy drift observation
completedImprovements.evidence: Historical provider/copy drift is not an active runtime defect and is superseded by current QA/product state tracking.
completedImprovements.note: Copy can be adjusted with future content work, but it is not tracked as an active improvement.

completedImprovements.title: Retire weekly false-positive/false-negative report automation
completedImprovements.evidence: Weekly precision/recall reporting is an operations process automation item outside the portfolio demo scope.

completedImprovements.title: Retire current-session native Playwright MCP reload issue
completedImprovements.evidence: This is a Codex session/tool reload condition, not product runtime behavior; HTTP JSON-RPC probe was green.
completedImprovements.note: Resolve by starting a fresh tool session if needed, not by changing product code.

completedImprovements.title: Retire Mistral ministral-3b provider candidate evaluation
completedImprovements.evidence: Candidate evaluation is a low-priority provider decision, not a product defect; current routing stack remains stable.
completedImprovements.note: Reopen only if provider cost/latency policy changes.

notes: No-action cleanup result: 9 accepted no-fix items were closed because they are platform/free-tier/history/tooling/provider-candidate records, not product improvements to pursue.
Fixable AI routing, evidence, response-quality, and UI consistency items remain in WONT-FIX for later explicit promotion or continued acceptance.
